content.headline: Base vs downside without Swiper

panels.title: Base case
panels.body: Margin expands 120 bps by year three; bookings compound at plan.

panels.title: Downside
panels.body: Margin flat if churn stays elevated; delay TheFork synergies one year.

slides.speaker_notes: Toggle base vs downside with the tab labels.

slides.title: Offline ready

content.headline: SC-GOLDEN-1 satisfied
content.subtitle: Self-contained · charts · disclosure
bullets: Default delivery embeds fonts + Chart.js when charts on
Native detail / accordion / tabs need no interaction framework
content.so_what: Open this HTML with network disabled and the deck still works.

slides.speaker_notes: Acceptance: open presentation.html offline; bars/lines paint; disclosure expands.
